results.snippet: # Capital of Canada: Why Ottawa? # Capital of Canada: Why Ottawa? Capital of Canada: Why Ottawa? Creating the Province of Canada prompted the need of a single capital city. ## Creating the Province of Canada prompted the need of a single capital city, however, the pre-Confederation colonies of Upper and Lower Canada could not agree on a permanent site to establish this. When the Province of Canada was established, Kingston was initially selected as the capital city. In 1867, the Dominion of Canada was established, and Ottawa continued to serve as the capital. ### Why Ottawa Remains the Capital City. Over the years, Ottawa has grown into a vibrant and dynamic capital city, embodying Canada's values of diversity, inclusivity, and cooperation.
